footer.quote_1: // "Talk is cheap. Show me the code." — Linus Torvalds

about_me.title: About Me
about_me.text: I'm a computer science student focused on **cybersecurity** and **networking**, with a strong interest in low-level systems, Linux, and open‑source software. I enjoy learning how things work under the hood — from memory management to network protocols — and applying that knowledge in practical projects.

programming_langs.title: Programming Languages
programming_langs.langs: Rust Zig_(16.2) JavaScript TypeScript Lua Python PHP Java C#

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.text: I believe in continuous learning (not thorw Youtube courses obviously ), simplicity, and building strong foundations. I prefer tools that respect user freedom, transparency, and **\*performance**.
